advanced_training.name: Freelancer Certification
advanced_training.description: Permanent patron license. When seeking Patrons, always succeed on the availability roll.
advanced_training.instruction: TRAINING: Freelancer Certification (15 cr) - Always succeed on Patron availability rolls.

advanced_training.name: Instructor
advanced_training.description: Crew member becomes an instructor. Other crew can train without paying fees or rolling availability.
advanced_training.instruction: TRAINING: Instructor (10 cr) - Other crew train for free without availability roll.

advanced_training.name: Survival Course
advanced_training.description: When encountering a trap or environmental hazard, roll D6: 4+ to evade it entirely.
advanced_training.instruction: TRAINING: Survival Course (10 cr) - D6 4+ to evade traps/hazards.

advanced_training.name: Fixer
advanced_training.description: +1 to Find Patron, Recruit, and Track rolls.
advanced_training.instruction: TRAINING: Fixer (15 cr) - +1 to Find Patron, Recruit, and Track rolls.

advanced_training.name: Tactical Course
advanced_training.description: On activation, this character may take their action before moving.
advanced_training.instruction: TRAINING: Tactical Course (15 cr) - May act before moving on activation.

compendium_bot_upgrades.name: Built-in Weapon
compendium_bot_upgrades.description: Any weapon built into chassis. Negates Heavy and Clumsy traits. Cost: 3 Credits per Shot on weapon profile + 1 Credit per point of weapon Damage. 1 Credit to revert.
compendium_bot_upgrades.instruction: BOT UPGRADE: Built-in Weapon (3 cr x Shots + 1 cr x Damage) - Negates Heavy/Clumsy. 1 cr to revert.

compendium_bot_upgrades.name: Improved Armor Casing
compendium_bot_upgrades.description: Improve the Bot's built-in Armor Saving Throw to 5+.
compendium_bot_upgrades.instruction: BOT UPGRADE: Improved Armor Casing (5 cr) - Built-in 5+ Armor Save.

compendium_bot_upgrades.name: Deflection Module
compendium_bot_upgrades.description: The Bot's built-in saving throw becomes both a Screen and Armor, allowing a save as long as the attack does not negate both forms of defense.
compendium_bot_upgrades.instruction: BOT UPGRADE: Deflection Module (8 cr) - Save counts as both Screen AND Armor.

compendium_bot_upgrades.name: Jump Module
compendium_bot_upgrades.description: May replace any portion of movement (including Dash movement) by a Jump of equal distance. Jumping does not affect or restrict other actions.
compendium_bot_upgrades.instruction: BOT UPGRADE: Jump Module (6 cr) - Replace any movement (incl. Dash) with Jump of equal distance.

compendium_bot_upgrades.name: Multi-wave Scanner
compendium_bot_upgrades.description: +1 to all rolls to Seize the Initiative. Cumulative with a party-carried Motion Tracker.
compendium_bot_upgrades.instruction: BOT UPGRADE: Multi-wave Scanner (10 cr) - +1 Seize the Initiative (stacks with Motion Tracker).

compendium_bot_upgrades.name: Broad Spectrum Vision
compendium_bot_upgrades.description: See through darkness, smoke, fog, gas and other impediments normally, without penalty.
compendium_bot_upgrades.instruction: BOT UPGRADE: Broad Spectrum Vision (6 cr) - Ignore all visibility penalties.

new_ship_parts.name: Expanded Database
new_ship_parts.description: Constantly updated database with AI assistance. When rolling to progress an active Quest (Post-Battle Step 3) add +1 to the roll.
new_ship_parts.instruction: SHIP COMPONENT: Expanded Database (10 cr) - +1 to Quest progress rolls.

new_ship_parts.name: Scientific Research System
new_ship_parts.description: Gathers and analyzes space debris samples. When traveling to another world, roll 1D6: 1-2 Nothing, 3-4 Research data (2 Credits), 5-6 +1 Quest Rumor.
new_ship_parts.instruction: SHIP COMPONENT: Scientific Research System (10 cr) - Travel roll: 1D6: 1-2 nothing, 3-4 earn 2 cr, 5-6 +1 Quest Rumor.

new_ship_parts.name: Miniaturized Components
new_ship_parts.description: State-of-the-art lightweight components. The modified component is not counted towards increased fuel costs (Core Rules p.61). Cannot be removed once applied. Can retrofit existing component for 8 Credits.
new_ship_parts.instruction: COMPONENT MOD: Miniaturized Components (+5 cr / 8 cr retrofit) - Component doesn't count toward fuel costs.

psionic_equipment.name: Warding Shrel
psionic_equipment.description: Odd Precursor device. If the wearer would suffer the effects of psionic Strain, the effect is avoided and the device shuts down for the rest of the battle. Carrying two Shrels cancels the effects of both.
psionic_equipment.instruction: PSIONIC GEAR: Warding Shrel (10 cr, Utility) - Avoid one Strain effect per battle. Carrying two cancels both.

psionic_equipment.name: Psionic Focus
psionic_equipment.description: Wrist-mounted device that helps channel psionic waves. Add +1" to the range of all powers.
psionic_equipment.instruction: PSIONIC GEAR: Psionic Focus (10 cr, Utility) - +1" range to all psionic powers.

psionic_equipment.name: Nullification Surgery
psionic_equipment.description: The character permanently loses all psionic abilities. This is non-reversible.
psionic_equipment.instruction: PSIONIC GEAR: Nullification Surgery (3 cr, Implant) - Permanently remove all psionic abilities. Irreversible.
